name: proflow-plumbing-video
description: Remotion video production for ProFlow Plumbing

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts ProFlowPromo out/proflow-promo.mp4
scripts.render:short: npx remotion render src/index.ts ProFlowShort out/proflow-short.mp4
scripts.render:still: npx remotion still src/index.ts ProFlowPromo out/thumbnail.png --frame=30
